updates: Replaced PDF page-slicing with precise canvas-crop pagination to fix row-splitting artifacts
Split export buttons into separate download and share actions (16 locations)
Hardened clipboard/WhatsApp sharing with multi-tier fallbacks for WebView
Fixed silent data-deletion bug in PDF/share exports affecting five tables
Deferred heavy libraries (html2canvas, jsPDF, XLSX) and removed dead code for performance
Retailer > Sales sub-tab: removed Action column, added month/year filter, redesigned detail ledger to match physical collection-sheet format with dedicated PDF/Share/Excel export
Retailer > Retailer List sub-tab: removed redundant title/header and its own date filter
Retailer > Sales & Payment sub-tab: added Sales Value column; sales quantity now sourced from actual delivery challans
Added bag/ton unit-toggle switches across all remaining sales-volume displays (Dealer and Retailer tabs)
Dealer > Counter Sales / Retail Sales sub-tabs: redesigned to unique retailer rows with summed totals, reduced to 3 columns (Excel export still full detail)
Added new Ledger sub-tab to Dealer tab (Opening Balance, Commission, Stock Value, Credit Limit, per-DO table with running balance and overdue tracking)
Ledger: rows filtered by global month/year; added Payment column and Total Payment card; added Grand Total with Stock figure
Ledger: fixed sales-line source to use actual delivery entries instead of DO stock-purchase entries
Ledger UI redesign: collapsible detail group, three-dot edit menus for editable cards, always-visible Outstanding Balance card
Commission card: dynamic month label, fixed to overwrite instead of accumulate
Stock Value: fixed to respect month filter and carry-forward logic; later converted to manual entry, then to DO-dropdown-based auto price lookup with manual bag count
Fixed dashboard-wide silent crash caused by undefined variable in Ledger render function
Dashboard: added total-count line under Active Retailer and Active Contractor cards
Ledger: updated Outstanding Balance formula (Opening + Total Value − Total Payment − Total Commission + Stock Value)
Added matching Outstanding Balance card to main dashboard
Ledger renamed to 'Dealer Statement'; toggle button and cards relabeled/restyled
Ledger: added editable Dealer Name field, persisted to localStorage
Ledger: Opening Balance now stored per month, auto-carrying forward previous month's closing balance unless manually overridden (capped at 36-month lookback)

Full Bengali/English language-toggle audit: fixed Ledger, Sales Target sub-tab, dashboard card headings, report table headers, global month/year filter popup, and several untranslated sub-tab button labels
Fixed Sales Target table not rendering on page load/language switch
Fixed 36-month carry-forward bug causing wildly incorrect negative balances on months with no prior data
Stock Value: finalized as point-in-time snapshot at end of filtered month, summing all undelivered DOs (no carry cap) minus deliveries dated on/before that month
Fixed untranslated 'Today's Delivery' / 'Yesterday's Delivery' and Retail/Counter Sale % dashboard card headings
Ran full regression suite (10+ Playwright scripts) with zero JS errors after all fixes
Remaining known gap: Memo/Challan Slip generator section and its Settings panel still Bengali-only (out of scope for this pass)
